zh.Horsmonden, Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Engla: 英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯
zh.Horsmonden, Kent, , England: 英國英格蘭肯特霍斯蒙登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Baldock於大約1530年出生在英國肯特霍斯蒙登時，他的父親John James Baldock27歲，母親Jane Hughes24歲。他於大約1540年與Lady Elizabeth Baldwin在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年5月9日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特霍斯蒙登。

zh-hans.Horsmonden, Kent, , England: 英国英格兰肯特霍斯蒙登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Baldock于大约1530年出生在英国肯特霍斯蒙登时，他的父亲John James Baldock27岁，母亲Jane Hughes24岁。他于大约1540年与Lady Elizabeth Baldwin在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年5月9日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特霍斯蒙登。

nameMeanings.name: Baldock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hertfordshire, first named in the 12th century by the Knights Templar, who held the manor there. It was named in commemoration of the city of Baghdad, known in Middle English and Old French as Baldac.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Baldock was born about 1530, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, his father, John James Baldock, was 27 and his mother, Jane Hughes, was 24. He married Lady Elizabeth Baldwin about 1540, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 9 May 1571, in his hometown, and was buried in Horsmonden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Baldock est né environ 1530, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John James Baldock, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jane Hughes, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Baldwin environ 1540, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 9 mai 1571, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1540 in Kent, England Lady Elizabeth Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 9. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Baldwin circa 1540, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 9 maggio 1571, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Horsmonden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Baldockが約1530年にイギリスケントホールスモンデンで生まれた時，父John James Baldockは27歳，母Jane Hughesは24歳であった。約1540年にイギリスケントでLady Elizabeth Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年5月9日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントホールスモンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Baldock(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John James Baldock(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hughes(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 켄트에서 Lady Elizabeth Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 5월 9일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 호르스몽에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Baldwin aproximadamente 1540, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 9 de maio de 1571, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Baldock родился около 1530 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John James Baldock было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hughes, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Baldwin около 1540 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 9 май 1571 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия.
